ccel.title: NPNF1-01. The Confessions and Letters of St. Augustine, with a Sketch of his Life and Work

source.title: NPNF1-01. The Confessions and Letters of St. Augustine, with a Sketch of his Life and Work
NPNF1-01. The Confessions and Letters of St. Augustine, with a Sketch of his Life and Work

verses.text: A letter to Augustin from Paulinus and Therasia, the substance of which is sufficiently stated in the next letter, which contains the reply of Augustin to his friend’s questions concerning the present life, the nature of the bodies of the blessed in the life to come, and the functions of the members of the body after the resurrection.
